name: Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add eggs, milk, oil, and grated lemon peel to the dry ingredients. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Pour the batter into an 8- or 9-inch square pan lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and pour lemon syrup over the top of the squares.
7. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes. Baste any exposed edges with collected syrup.
8. Cool in the pan on a rack.
Lemon Syrup:
1. In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar and lemon juice until well combined.
